title: scabiosa graeca
intro: Scabiosa graeca, also known as Greek scabiosa, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Scabiosa graeca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
